title: [MTR] Snapcab Elevator/Lift Textures
description: A resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway Elevators/Lifts to add textures from Snapcab elevator company to the mod.
body: This resource pack adds laminate surface textures from Snapcab to the Minecraft Transit Railway mod. Currently has steel finishes for the doors and frames with gold to be added soon. Minecraft Transit Railway 4.0.0 is required for this resource pack to function, it should be functional on all versions of Minecraft that MTR is compatible with.
